intro_scene_beginning: Each day, Hannibal prepares for the impossible. A crossing through the nightmare of the Alps...
The war with the Romans has raged for years, with no end in sight.
Catching the Romans off guard by crossing the Alps may be his only chance.
beginning_beginning: Supplies ran out two days ago.
The men started eating our horses.
stamped_just_table_beginning: More and more orders and requests from the men.
I can't stand these decisions anymore.
But supplies from Carthage will come any day now.
last_real_stamp_beginning: More and more orders and decisions.
last_real_stamp_completed: We have been weeks in these mountains,
dream_fade_beginning: The heavy thud of the stamp...
It sounds like marching boots in the snow.
dream_fade_completed: The cold biting at our heels... the endless march.
tree_blocking_completed: There is no force capable of stopping my revenge upon Rome itself.
elephant_decisions_beginning: Tough decisions had to be made.
food_eagle_beginning: The enemy taunts us on the way.
They will tremble when reinforcements arrive.
ambush_walls_beginning: I will either find a way or make one.
I still remember the coward's strike from the rear.
We had to build barricades from whatever we could find.
ambush_fight_beginning: And those fools paid for their treachery in blood.
final_battle_beginning: Once the supplies and reinforcements from Carthage arrive...
We will descend from these mountains.
And we will crush Rome itself!
